title: ctenitis leptorhachia
intro: Ctenitis leptorhachia, also known as the fern-like plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis leptorhachia include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, with the leaves and stems being used in various traditional medicine preparations.
